ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product category */,
  "product_subcategory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product subcategory */,
  "diameter" TEXT /* Diameter of the product (e.g., 3/32") */,
  "circumference" TEXT /* Circumference of the product (e.g., 9/32") */,
  "put_up_length" TEXT /* Put-up length of the product (e.g., 1000") */,
  "tensile_strength" TEXT /* Tensile strength of the product (e.g., 275 lbs.) */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the product (e.g., 3.5 lbs.) */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the product (e.g., nylon, polyester) */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color options available for the product */,
  "product_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each product for easy reference */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the product was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the product information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_product_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("product_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_product_subcategory_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_subcategory_id") REFERENCES product_subcategories ("product_subcategory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "product_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product category */,
  "product_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the product category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category to support hierarchical categories */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_subcategories" (
  "product_subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product subcategory */,
  "product_subcategory_name" TEXT /* Name of the product subcategory */,
  "product_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product subcategory */,
  "parent_subcategory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent subcategory to support hierarchical subcategories */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_subcategory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_subcategories_product_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("product_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_subcategories_parent_subcategory_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_subcategory_id") REFERENCES product_subcategories ("product_subcategory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Current quantity in stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the inventory was last updated */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* The stock level at which a reorder should be initiated */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the inventory (e.g., warehouse, storage room) */,
  "shelf_life" TEXT /* Expiration date or shelf life of the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the inventory record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the inventory record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the supplier */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the supplier */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the supplier */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Payment terms agreed with the supplier (e.g., net 30, net 60) */,
  "credit_limit" REAL /* Credit limit for the supplier */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the supplier was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the supplier information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "supplier_products" (
  "supplier_product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product from the supplier */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Time it takes for the supplier to deliver the product after an order is placed */,
  "minimum_order_quantity" INTEGER /* Minimum quantity that can be ordered from the supplier */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the supplier product was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the supplier product information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_supplier_products_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_supplier_products_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected date of delivery */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual date of delivery */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the order was placed */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the order information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, sales, inventory manager) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
